content.raw:
{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"Like an owl in the ruins of truth I lament
Not the embarrassments of youth
Nor agonies of middle age
But that In my dotage I should see
The triumph of demagoguery
Merciless aggression and the future
Repeating the past","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"},{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"Let my voice trouble
The glutted sleep
Of the righteous.","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"}],"nodeType":"document"}
